meta.title: Single Malt Society Event Background Plate

subject.name: Crystal whiskey glass with amber scotch on peat-stained oak

physical_properties.primary_element: heavy lead-crystal whiskey glass with a generous pour of amber single-malt scotch and one large clear ice sphere catching warm refractions
physical_properties.secondary_element: natural cork stopper resting beside the glass, faint sherry-cask staining at its base
physical_properties.tertiary_element: thin curl of vapor rising from the glass and dissipating into shadow, faint peat-smoke haze in the air

foreground.notes: positioned on the rule-of-thirds intersection so upper-left two-thirds remain clean for overlay text; faceted lead-crystal glass, amber scotch glow lit from within by the key light, single 2-inch ice sphere catching warm refractions
natural cork bottle stopper laid on its side, faint sherry-cask staining at the base, suggesting a recently opened bottle

midground.notes: small leather-bound tasting journal open at an angle, faint fountain-pen ink strokes visible but unreadable (no legible text), out of focus; suggests careful note-keeping without revealing content

background.notes: out-of-focus row of dark glass scotch bottles with handwritten paper labels on a shadowed wooden shelf; bottles read as suggestion not branding, no legible text or logos
deep mahogany or walnut wainscoting, vertical grain, mostly in shadow with one warm light pool on the upper-left for text legibility
very subtle volumetric haze across the frame with a faint peat-smoke tint, catches the key light into soft god-rays without obscuring detail

surface.description: aged peat-stained oak tabletop with subtle ring-stain patina and a soft satin sheen, not glossy; darker and more weathered than typical walnut to read as scotch-cellar provenance

background.negative_space_zone: upper_left_to_center — keep visually quiet for overlay text

atmosphere.mood: scotch-nerd reverent, sherry-cask intimate, dusty-old-bottle prestigious, after-hours members-only

camera.focus_point: amber scotch and ice sphere refractions
camera.composition_notes: rule of thirds — subject locked to lower-right intersection; upper-left two-thirds reserved for event title overlay

lighting.key_light_quality: warm tungsten ~2700K, soft falloff, motivated by an unseen table lamp; backlights the amber scotch so the pour glows from within
lighting.rim_light_notes: subtle warm rim on ice sphere edge and glass rim to separate from background; faint rim along cork stopper
lighting.practical_lights: distant out-of-focus warm bokeh points in deep background (suggesting bar shelving / candles)

brand.palette_intent: warm gold and burgundy accents on near-black warm base, matching Lounge & Co. design tokens

controls.render_intent: photoreal, shot on medium-format, low ISO, fine grain
